conservative.name: Breath of Life
conservative.requirements:
12 power
engaged with target corpse of a living being killed within the last five minutes

success.description: You return life to the freshly-dead. Over about the next hour, all the target's mortal wounds are healed (the target recovers critical and normal wounds until he had 1 fewer critical wound than his Toughness and 1 fewer normal wound than his wound threshold) and he awakens to life.

boon.description: The target recovers normal wounds equal to the number of generated

chaosStar.description: For each critical wound the target recovers, you suffer 1 critical wound. for each normal wound the target recovers, you suffer 1 normal wound

sigmarsComet.description: There's no need to wait an hour- the target's regeneration occurs almost instantaneously
